data.title: onboarding: 31 individual file-edit confirmations required -> consolidate into scripts to reduce confirmation count
data.description:
## Incident Overview
/dso:onboarding generates approximately 31 individual file edit confirmations during setup, requiring the user to approve each one individually. This creates significant friction, especially for users unfamiliar with the tool.

## Expected vs Observed
- **Expected**: /dso:onboarding consolidates file creation/editing into batch scripts that run with a single confirmation, and instructs the user to set their permissions mode to 'auto' at the start of onboarding to reduce ongoing prompts.
- **Observed**: /dso:onboarding edits 31+ files one at a time, each requiring a separate user confirmation.

## Affected Component
plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — file creation strategy and permissions mode instruction

## Fix Approaches
1. Consolidate file writes into shell scripts (one confirmation for the script, not per-file)
2. Instruct the user to run '/permissions auto' or equivalent at the start of onboarding
3. Combine both approaches

## Notes
Reported by user during interactive session.
